overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit commercial district. The player moves from covered walkways past shops and advertisements, through an open plaza with vending machines and stairs, and ends at a street crosswalk with passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath overhead digital billboards and shop signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking toward the camera
pedestrian in brown jacket walking away from the camera

entered.detail: metal and concrete overhead structure covering the pedestrian walkway
large illuminated advertising screen displaying animated content
storefront with bright orange neon signage reading PIZZA
metal railings separating sidewalk from the street
tall pole with bright white LED lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered commercial walkway at night, with the camera moving forward beneath a concrete overpass structure. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the scene from above and the right side, while a metal pedestrian barrier separates the walkway from the street. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the wet concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional covered walkway approaching open plaza

events.description: the covered walkway opens up as the camera approaches the plaza exit

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as the roof structure becomes more open and sky becomes visible

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green neon sign for a business named CHILL
green illuminated cross symbol indicating medical facility
massive concrete support pillars and beams of the highway overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a transitional section where the covered walkway begins to open up, revealing partial sky visibility. New neon signage including a green CHILL sign and medical clinic symbol appear on the right, while the massive concrete overpass structure becomes visible ahead. The pedestrian barrier continues along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with concrete stairs and large advertising displays

events.description: exiting the covered walkway completely into the open plaza with visible sky
approaching the food vending area with illuminated displays

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs in the plaza toward the large billboard display

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the top of the stairs looking at the billboard

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying MaxTac advertisement with bright white light
wide set of stairs leading up to the plaza level with wet reflective surfaces
illuminated food service counter with menu displays
round metal tables with stools for outdoor dining
large trees with green foliage in built-in planters

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered area into a wide-open plaza with full sky visibility, ascending concrete stairs toward a massive illuminated billboard. The environment shifts to paved tiles with trees and outdoor seating, while food vending stalls with bright lighting become prominent on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza vending area with outdoor seating and food carts

events.description: turning left to head back toward the street and crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: turning around near the vending machines to head back toward the street crosswalk

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the food cart preparing items

entered.detail: row of automated vending machines with illuminated product displays
food service cart with black and white striped pattern

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left in the plaza area, moving past a wall of vending machines and a zebra-patterned food cart. The large billboard exits the frame as the camera reorients toward the street, with plaza trees now prominent in the center of the view and the crosswalk becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crosswalk with vehicle traffic under overpass

events.description: multiple vehicles driving past on the wet street including a blue sports car
rain intensity increases with visible streaks in the streetlight beams

agents.ego_description: approaching and waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass by on the wet road

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving past on the wet asphalt
black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow parallel stripes
staircase structure leading up to the highway overpass with green railings
short posts with yellow and black stripes separating lanes

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves to the street level at a yellow-striped crosswalk under the highway overpass. Vehicles including a blue sports car and black sedan drive past on the rain-slicked road, while the camera waits at the intersection. The rain becomes visibly heavier, creating streaks in the artificial lighting, and the overpass stairs structure dominates the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered neon-lit walkway into a wide-open urban plaza and finally down to a rain-slicked street intersection. It begins beneath a concrete overpass, moving forward along a wet sidewalk lined with digital billboards and metal barriers. As the covered walkway opens up, the camera passes green neon signage and medical clinic symbols before emerging into a bright plaza where it ascends concrete stairs toward a massive illuminated billboard. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left past a row of vending machines and food carts, moving through a landscaped area with trees toward the distant road. Finally, the camera reaches a yellow-striped crosswalk under the highway overpass, where the rain intensifies into visible streaks as sports cars and sedans glide past on the shimmering asphalt.
